caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid black background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She is wearing a light green, patterned blouse with red embroidery and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom-left corner of the scene, a logo for "NPTEL" is visible. Across the sequence, she maintains a consistent position, speaking with her mouth open and her hands raised in front of her chest to emphasize her points. Her hand movements shift slightly between frames, moving from a wider open-palm gesture to a more closed, focused position as she continues to talk. The lighting remains steady, focused on her face and upper body, while the background remains entirely dark and unchanging.
